name: Five Iron Golf
about: Five Iron Golf Boston - Government Center is an indoor golf simulator venue that combines state-of-the-art technology with a social, bar atmosphere. It features multiple bays equipped with Trackman launch monitors, allowing golfers to play on virtual courses ranging from Pebble Beach to other PGA Tour venues. The venue offers a range of services including simulator rentals, golf lessons, custom club fittings, and event hosting for both small and large groups. With no dress code and a full-service bar and kitchen, it aims to make golf accessible and entertaining for players of all skill levels. Pricing operates on a per-bay-hour basis with membership options available that include free play during benefit hours and discounts on food, beverages, and other services.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology provides accurate, actionable data for serious practice and play
Convenient downtown Boston location near historic landmarks like Faneuil Hall and the Old State House
Full-service bar and chef-inspired menu offer a complete social and dining experience alongside golf

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service kitchen with a chef-inspired menu, including items like boneless wings (available with a rental).
Full-service bar available at the location.

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art launch monitors providing accurate data on ball flight, spin rate, swing speed, club path, and attack angle.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or rent them at the venue. The club fitting service also allows for custom club purchases.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not permitted; however, the venue has a full-service bar and kitchen with a chef-inspired menu available for all guests.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A full 18 holes can vary in time depending on the course and number of players, but a simulator bay rental is booked by the hour, typically accommodating a round in 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is Five Iron Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly, offering kids' birthday party packages and junior clinics. It has a casual atmosphere suitable for families.
